command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Restart openclaw-gateway (user service) ==="
systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway 2>/dev/null && echo "restarted (user)" || (sudo systemctl restart openclaw-gateway 2>/dev/null && echo "restarted (system)")
sleep 12

echo "=== Active? ==="
systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway 2>/dev/null || systemctl is-active openclaw-gateway 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Check for the allowFrom error (should be GONE) + telegram startup ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "30 seconds ago" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram|Invalid allowFrom|polling|group|error" | tail -15

echo ""
echo "=== Telegram bot polling active? ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAEohhXQGCPXJse6u6IKjrcpZiZ_hLyragc/getWebhookInfo" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); r=d.get('result',{}); print('webhook:', repr(r.get('url')), '(empty=polling mode, correct for OpenClaw)')"

echo ""
echo "=== Port 9119 still up ==="
ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 9119 || echo "checking..."
REMOTE
